name: chain_implication_after_apply_hQR
goal: ∀ (P Q R : Prop), P → (P → Q) → (Q → R) → R
tactics: intro P Q R hP hPQ hQR

name: and_commutativity_after_constructor
goal: ∀ (P Q : Prop), P ∧ Q → Q ∧ P

name: or_elimination_after_cases
goal: ∀ (P Q R : Prop), (P → R) → (Q → R) → P ∨ Q → R
tactics: intro P Q R hPR hQR hOr
